CustomField.formula: IF(ShippingCountry <> "US","NA", IF(CONTAINS("080, 081, 082, 083, 084", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S01", IF(CONTAINS("170, 171, 172, 173, 174, 175, 176, 179", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S02", IF(CONTAINS("189, 193, 195, 196", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S03", IF(CONTAINS("190, 191, 192, 194", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S04", IF(CONTAINS("197, 198, 199", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S05", IF(CONTAINS("168, 169, 177, 178, 180, 181, 182, 183, 184, 185, 186, 187, 188", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S06", IF(CONTAINS("200, 202, 203, 204, 205, 208, 209", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S07", IF(CONTAINS("201, 206, 207, 220, 221, 222, 223, 224, 225, 226, 227, 228", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S08", IF(CONTAINS("229, 230, 231, 232, 233, 234, 235, 236, 237, 238, 239, 240, 241, 242, 243, 244, 245, 246", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S09", IF(CONTAINS("212, 214, 215, 217, 254, 267, 268", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S10", IF(CONTAINS("210, 211, 216, 218, 219", left(ShippingPostalCode,3)), "S11", "NA"))))))))))))
CustomField.label: GeoCodeSxx
